title: Xiaohongshu Nine Grid Life Guide Poster AI
sourceTitle: Xiaohongshu Nine Grid Life Guide Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu nine-grid life-guide poster for 让自己不内耗的8个小动作, designed as a gentle self-care manual with clearly separable cards. Subject: 写下最烦的一件事, 只定一个下一步, 把手机放远一点, 喝一杯热水, 整理桌面一角, 出门走十分钟, 给自己一句准话, 今天先到这里 become the eight practical life actions plus one title or summary cell, each expressed as a calm mini card with a short Chinese label, tiny note, and soft icon. Scene: Warm life-manual poster on light beige paper with pale green accents, warm gray dividers, hand-drawn line details, subtle skeuomorphic icons, and a quiet emotional-support atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical nine-grid layout with clear boundaries for later slicing: one title or cover cell and eight action cells, each cell behaving like an independent Xiaohongshu card, with consistent spacing, icon placement, and concise Chinese text. Signature Elements: Nine clean grid cells, 让自己不内耗的8个小动作, 写下最烦的一件事, 只定一个下一步, 把手机放远一点, 喝一杯热水, 整理桌面一角, 出门走十分钟, 给自己一句准话, 今天先到这里, hand-drawn line icons, light skeuomorphic details, clear slicing boundaries, warm self-care tone, and gentle life-handbook polish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Light beige base, pale cyan-green accents, warm gray dividers, charcoal text, soft cream icon surfaces, and restrained muted highlights only. Lighting: Soft flat paper lighting with gentle icon shadows, calm warm ambience, and clear mobile readability across all nine cells. Typography: Chinese gentle life-guide labels appear as short readable Chinese labels in each grid cell; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu nine-grid life-guide poster for 把一天过轻一点的8个微习惯, designed as a gentle self-care manual with clearly separable cards. Subject: 醒来先坐一分钟, 只看一个待办, 慢慢吃第一口饭, 把消息分批处理, 给房间开窗, 写下三件小事, 睡前收起屏幕, 对自己温柔一点 become the eight practical life actions plus one title or summary cell, each expressed as a calm mini card with a short Chinese label, tiny note, and soft icon. Scene: Warm life-manual poster on light beige paper with pale green accents, warm gray dividers, hand-drawn line details, subtle skeuomorphic icons, and a quiet emotional-support atmosphere. Signature Elements: Nine clean grid cells, 把一天过轻一点的8个微习惯, 醒来先坐一分钟, 只看一个待办, 慢慢吃第一口饭, 把消息分批处理, 给房间开窗, 写下三件小事, 睡前收起屏幕, 对自己温柔一点, hand-drawn line icons, light skeuomorphic details, clear slicing boundaries, warm self-care tone, and gentle life-handbook polish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Theme: 3:4 Xiaohongshu nine-grid life-guide poster for 把一天过轻一点的8个微习惯, designed as a gentle self-care manual with clearly separable cards. Subject: 醒来先坐一分钟, 只看一个待办, 慢慢吃第一口饭, 把消息分批处理, 给房间开窗, 写下三件小事, 睡前收起屏幕, 对自己温柔一点 become the eight practical life actions plus one title or summary cell, each expressed as a calm mini card with a short Chinese label, tiny note, and soft icon. Scene: Warm life-manual poster on light beige paper with pale green accents, warm gray dividers, hand-drawn line details, subtle skeuomorphic icons, and a quiet emotional-support atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical nine-grid layout with clear boundaries for later slicing: one title or cover cell and eight action cells, each cell behaving like an independent Xiaohongshu card, with consistent spacing, icon placement, and concise Chinese text. Signature Elements: Nine clean grid cells, 把一天过轻一点的8个微习惯, 醒来先坐一分钟, 只看一个待办, 慢慢吃第一口饭, 把消息分批处理, 给房间开窗, 写下三件小事, 睡前收起屏幕, 对自己温柔一点, hand-drawn line icons, light skeuomorphic details, clear slicing boundaries, warm self-care tone, and gentle life-handbook polish. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Light beige base, pale cyan-green accents, warm gray dividers, charcoal text, soft cream icon surfaces, and restrained muted highlights only. Lighting: Soft flat paper lighting with gentle icon shadows, calm warm ambience, and clear mobile readability across all nine cells. Typography: Chinese gentle life-guide labels appear as short readable Chinese labels in each grid cell; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
